chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-3636 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(s) For orders on office objection. For hearing of main case. 27-03-2019. Petitioner is present on ad-interim pre-arrest bail. Mr. Ashok Kumar, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Aslam Pervaiz Khan, Asst: Attorney General. Mr. Jangu Khan, Special Prosecutor NAB. = Learned Special Prosecutor NAB has submitted that petitioner has filed an application for plea bargain before the trial Court, which has been accepted vide order dated 14.03.2019 and has placed a copy of the said order on record. Learned counsel for the petitioner has confirmed this fact and does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE *Fahad Memon*
